decisions.rationale: RepeatingGroup_list_ is a named ui_ref and review ui_evidence is partial, but ir/slices/styles.json resolves the style_ref to border_width 0 and background_style none — no visible delta versus the current Tailwind container (space-y-1 overflow-y-auto). Element ai_RNbBHXbL passes hierarchy and data-bubble-id checks; AC-1 passes. Applying bubbleStyle for DS-01 consistency is polish, not a blocking fidelity gap for this item.

DeleteConversationPopup mount is explicitly scoped to CHAT-04-delete-conversation-popup per decompose. CHAT-02 deliverable is the sidebar trigger wiring: bU onDeleteRequest → Chat.tsx deleteTarget state plus data-delete-target-id handoff. CHAT-04 depends_on CHAT-02 and will consume deleteTarget; interim no-modal behavior is expected until that item lands.

Hover-gated opacity on ai_RNbBHXbR (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100) is a brownfield UX enhancement; ir/inventory.json does not encode hover-only visibility on the action row. Not in CHAT-02 acceptance criteria; always-visible icons can be revisited during visual parity tooling if flagged.

bS rename trigger is wired (Pencil + onRenameRequest) for IR cell parity, but no rename-popup item exists in MOD-DRSAM-CHAT decompose. Chat.tsx handleRenameRequest no-op is an intentional stub until a future rename item is decomposed, mirroring the deleteTarget handoff pattern used for CHAT-04.

summary: Review passed (ok: true, 100% coverage, 0 blockers). Triage: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — prior blockers B-1/B-2/B-3 resolved. Deferred: C-1 RepeatingGroup_list_ style polish; C-2 popup mount to CHAT-04-delete-conversation-popup; C-3 hover reveal polish; C-4 rename flow pending future decompose item.
